LanguageData.FCP_Settings.General.tt: Options that affect the whole mod or don't fit anywhere else.
LanguageData.FCP_Settings_Stims_AutoStim_Desc: Pawns will automatically use stimpaks from their inventory when damaged.
LanguageData.FCP_Settings_Stims_TeetotalerAutoStim_De: Allow pawns with the teetotaler trait to automatically use stimpaks.
LanguageData.FCP_Settings_WeaponCondition_Enabled_Des: FCP weapons degrade with each shot. Below 30 condition they may jam mid-combat, causing a shot to fail and penalising shooting accuracy until cleared. At 1 condition the weapon is completely locked and must be repaired at a repair bench before it can fire again.
LanguageData.FCP_WeaponCondition_Disabled: BROKEN - must be repaired before use
LanguageData.FCP_RepairBench_Load_Desc: Select an FCP weapon from the map to load onto the bench for repair.
LanguageData.FCP_RepairBench_Eject_Desc: Remove the loaded weapon from the bench and drop it at the interaction cell.
LanguageData.FCP_RepairBench_NoWeapons: No FCP weapons found on the map.
LanguageData.FCP_RepairBench_NoHauler: No colonist available to haul the weapon to the bench.
LanguageData.FCP_ApparelBench_Load_Desc: Select an FCP garment or armor from the map to load onto the bench for repair.
LanguageData.FCP_ApparelBench_Eject_Desc: Remove the loaded item from the bench and drop it at the interaction cell.
LanguageData.FCP_ApparelBench_NoApparel: No FCP apparel found on the map.
LanguageData.FCP_ApparelBench_NoHauler: No colonist available to haul the item to the bench.
LanguageData.FCP_NoDeliveryQuestsAvailable: No delivery contracts available at this outpost right now.
LanguageData.FCP_Settings_Debug_tt: Options to help with the diagnosis of issues or modify behaviour for debugging
LanguageData.FCP_MessagePermitLostOnPromotion: Due to {0_possessive} promotion to {1}, {0_labelShort} has lost {0_possessive} {2} permit
LanguageData.FCP_Letter_SpecialWandererJoins: A pawn {PAWN_title} named {PAWN_nameDef} has arrived and wants to join the colony.
LanguageData.FCP_Techprint_Desc:
This is a techprint for the research project '{PROJECT_label}'. 
The physical form of techprints can range from scraps of paper with diagrams, all the way to advanced self-contained teaching machines. Regardless of form, they play the same role. They give your researchers the confidence that an idea is possible, and a rough idea of the designs used in more established societies. 
Your researchers need the foundational knowledge offered by techprints to know where to start on a given technology. Only after enough techprints have been applied can your researchers work out the fine details of how to make use of the technology in your particular situation. 
Applying techprints to a satisfied project fulfills half the remaining research progress. In addition, researchers always gain a boost to their intellectual skills when applying techprints, even on already-completed technologies.
LanguageData.FCP_Enemy_Of_Enlist_Faction_Desc: By enlisting with {ENLISTED_name}, you have become an enemy of {HOSTILE_name}. They are now hostile toward your colony.
LanguageData.GoodwillUnmet: not enough goodwill with {0}, require {1} minimum
LanguageData.FCP_NoHolotapeFound: {PAWN_nameDef} found no useful data in the terminal.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_ZoomTimeout: How many ticks after creation until we force remove the zoom (in case of bugs): {0} ticks
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_CooldownTicks: How many ticks the VATS cooldown is: {0} ticks
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_BodyPartMultipliers: Accuracy multipliers for various body parts.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_Gain_Per_Level_Mouseov: Values less than 1 exponentially scale to zero gain per level. Values greater than 1 exponentially scale to infinity.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_FlatHitChanceBoost: Flat boost to aiming with VATS [{0}].
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_FlatHitChanceBoost_Mou: Adds a flat boost to aiming, as the calculation for hit chance at lower levels is very not fun.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_Settings_ClampingFactor_Mouseov: Clamps the max accuracy boost, and scales appropriately
LanguageData.FCP_ShouldCaptureCommand: Will this cage capture wild animals.
LanguageData.FCP_CageAnimalCapturedText: You have captured {0} in your cage.
LanguageData.ME_ShowNowPlayingDescription: When on, a message will appear with the title of the currently selected track.
LanguageData.ME_VanillaMusicUpdateDescription: When on, RimWorld will play music periodically, rather than constantly.
LanguageData.ME_SelectSoundsDescription: This theme will be used for sounds when possible. Any sounds not replaced will use vanilla sounds.
LanguageData.ME_Vanilla_Description: All vanilla SongDefs implemented with the features of MusicExpanded!
LanguageData.FCP_CannotLaunchToOrbit: This vertibird is designed for atmospheric flight only and cannot reach orbital altitudes.
